spec.expr: 100 * (1 - clamp_min(((sum(ocr_failed_total) or vector(0)) - (sum(ocr_failed_total offset $__range) or vector(0))), 0) / clamp_min(((sum(ocr_duration_ms_count) or vector(0)) - (sum(ocr_duration_ms_count offset $__range) or vector(0))), 1))
histogram_quantile(0.95, sum by (le, label) (rate(speaker_id_latency_ms_bucket[$__rate_interval]))) or vector(0)
